overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in ancient Egyptian attire walking through a desert canyon at night. The scene features rocky cliffs, a starry sky, and moonlight gradually illuminating the sandy trail as the character progresses through the valley.

events.description: bright full moon rises into view from behind the right cliff face, illuminating the scene

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the desert trail through the narrow canyon

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face with layered sedimentary rock formations
sandy dirt path with visible wagon wheel tracks running through the canyon
gradual rocky slope with sparse dry vegetation
mountain peaks visible on the horizon beneath the starry sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow desert trail flanked by a tall rocky cliff on the left and a sloping hillside on the right. The night sky is filled with stars, and the path winds through the canyon toward distant mountains. Near the end of the segment, the bright moon becomes visible rising behind the right cliff.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert valley under bright moonlight

agents.ego_description: character continues walking through the wider desert valley illuminated by bright moonlight

entered.detail: full moon shining brightly in the upper right portion of the sky, casting shadows across the terrain
loose rocks and boulders scattered across the right side of the valley floor

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens into a wider valley as the bright moon becomes fully visible in the upper right, casting clear light across the sandy terrain. The left cliff recedes into the distance while scattered rock formations appear on the right. The character continues walking toward the distant mountains under the moonlit sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow desert canyon that gradually opens into a wide, moonlit valley. It begins with the character walking along a winding trail flanked by a towering rocky cliff and a sloping hillside under a dense canopy of stars. As the path progresses toward distant mountains, the bright moon begins to rise from behind the right cliff, shifting the lighting of the environment. The scene then expands as the canyon walls recede, revealing a broader sandy terrain dotted with scattered rock formations. Finally, the camera continues its forward motion under the full glow of the moon, tracking the character across the open valley toward the far horizon.
